title: matelea orthoneura
intro: Matelea orthoneura, also known as the "Coral Milk Vine," is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Matelea orthoneura include relief from pain, fever reduction, and the treatment of various infections, such as wounds and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Matelea orthoneura can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
